title: Notification for new workspace members
excerpt: Is there a way to send a notification to a member when they join a workspace - like a “welcome” message with information about that workspace?

posts.author: simone.steffen (Simone Steffen)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to send a notification to a member when they join a workspace - like a “welcome” message with information about that workspace?

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @simone.steffen ,
Its not possible to do so by using the build in automations.
You can use Monday.com’s API to create a custom automation that sends a welcome notification when a user joins a workspace.

Zaki
Business Workflow Consultant
Ready Logic

posts.author: simone.steffen (Simone Steffen)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the response, much appreciated

posts.author: theautomationpartner (Martin Meliendrez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Zaki, thanks for the insight!

I checked the monday API reference but couldn’t find any webhook or event related to when a user joins a workspace. Do you happen to know if there’s any way to capture that event — for example, through an audit log, webhook, or any indirect method?
